title: Eva and the Soul Alternate Theories
display_title: Eva and the Soul Alternate Theories
wikitext:
[]: Eva and the Soul Alternate Theories             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Wed Jan 30, 2013 5:13 am Now I'm sure this one's been done to death, but before I get merged I wanna point to the title and assure you, this topic is about Alternate theories. As it stands, the accepted facts/popular theories are as follows Unit-00 = Rei I (Theory) Unit-01 = Yui Ikari (Fact) Unit-02 = Part of Kyoko Zeppelin (Fact) Unit-03 = Toji's Mother (Theory) Unit-04 = Seemingly irrelevant MP Evas = Actually irrelevant as the Dummy Plug can sync with anyone who doesn't get pissy about it (Yui) And while I will avoid saying anything specific about it, knowing souls are a thing in Rebuild, this leads me to ask questions about Unit-05 = Unknown Mark.06 = Unknown Spoilers for 3.0 SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Wed Jan 30, 2013 8:11 am First up, congratulations on fitting the term "begs the question" five times into your post Lance. Relevant reading: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Begging_the_question#Modern_usage Why would the American built unit be compatible with a Japanese pilot?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Jan 30, 2013 9:05 am First, stop saying "begs the question". It doesn't mean what you think it means and using it the way you do makes you look like an idiot. Second, forget about the new movies. We still have no idea how the soul mechanics there work, and know only that Yui is in Unit 01. Apart from that we're deep in speculation land and it isn't relevant for this forum in any event (go to the Rebuild forum to talk about that). Third, try a thread search. All of this has been discussed many, many times before. There's room for more discussion (the common theory around here for Unit 00's soul needs some serious work, for instance), but there are lots of threads addressing the topic already.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Wed Jan 30, 2013 11:20 am I apologise for my repeated use of that phrase, honestly I wrote all of this when I was sleep deprived and barely thinking, though well done for the Princess Bride quote if that's what you were going for. Still, I'll fix that later. As for the new movies, I suspected including them would lead me to have to move this, though honestly just because there's a lot to speculate doesn't mean it's not relevant, we know Yui's soul was used to create 01 in Rebuild so it seems likely that others are the same. As for that last one, that'd be a fantastic idea if I knew how to do one of those. Now then, to edit that first post. EDIT: Well, fixed it. With the exception of one which I actually used properly even if my grammar is off. And to think, if I just said raises this discussion would be less about my grasp of the English language after being awake for nearly a full day and maybe perhaps about the actual thoughts I raised.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Jan 30, 2013 12:58 pm Thread search: go to the top of the page, click on the "Threads" link, use the search function of your browser to find a relevant topic. On the new material: no, we can't say it's "probably the same" with the others because we already know evas work differently in the NME. We can't assume anything at this point. As to the thoughts you raised, post them in the relevant threads and you'll probably get more bites. Most importantly, keep the Rebuild stuff in the Rebuild forum, as that's why it's there. You can not validly use the new stuff for evidence of anything in the old and vice versa. They are entirely different continuities.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Wed Jan 30, 2013 1:21 pm Whether or not they are the same continuity has yet to be entirely proven, and even in different continuity some things are likely to be the same. I'll admit I've put this in the wrong place, and if you've got an answer on how to move it I'll gladly do that. Finally, you missed a golden opportunity for a rebuild joke with the you can not thing. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Jan 30, 2013 1:27 pm You don't need to move the thread, just abandon it and ask your questions/post your theories in the relevant threads.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 31, 2013 3:16 am I think this thread is fine. There's a lot of discussion on the resident souls in evas but the majority of it is scattered all over the place with a couple of specific threads concerning Eva-00's soul. For Eva-03's soul, you have it scattered in threads like this: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/2663/Eva-Unit-03-Set-Up/ Souls in general have threads but they're not limited to the resident souls in Evas. Some of them were from ANF so you can't post in those threads.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Fri Feb 01, 2013 2:34 am Had to look up ANF, but I get the idea. So should I avoid bringing up Unit-03 here, or is it cool since this is for all the Evas? That aside, still looking into theories for the different Souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Feb 01, 2013 3:52 am Lance of LoL wrote: Had to look up ANF, but I get the idea. So should I avoid bringing up Unit-03 here, or is it cool since this is for all the Evas?

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Thu Feb 28, 2013 2:59 pm I read a theory on this very forum which I quite like about the Mass Production Evangelion Series. The MP Evas contain the souls of Shinji's classmates (Hikari, Touji, Kensuke, and the others from the background). Presumably their souls were uploaded against their will, so their last moments as humans being filled with grief, fear and pain may have caused their uploaded souls to become murderous and insane, which when combined with the already unpredictable Dummy Plugs, results in the MP Evas being completely animalistic and completely mad. When they are impaling themselves on their own replica Lances of Longuinus, the reason they seem so happy about it is, along with being used almost as extensions of Reilith's will, they are in ecstasy to finally end their miserable, painful existences.
